heading: Time not creditable toward years of service
label: 12734 Time not creditable toward years of service
notes: Historical and Revision Notes1956ActRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)1334(a)10:1036c (last sentence, as applicable to inactive status).10:1036g (last 41 words of 2d sentence).34:440k (last sentence, as applicable to inactive status)., §§ 304 (last sentence), 308 (last 41 words of 2d sentence), , 1090.June 29, 1948, ch. 70862 Stat. 1088(less 1st 16 words), .July 9, 1952, ch. 608, § 211(b)66 Stat. 48534:440 (last 41 words of 2d sentence).o50:931(b) (less 1st 16 words).1334(b)10:1036c (last sentence, less applicability to inactive status).34:440k (last sentence, less applicability to inactive status).Subsection (a) is substituted for 10:1036c (1st 17 words of last sentence, as applicable to inactive status), 10:1036g (last 41 words of 2d sentence), 34:440k (last 17 words of last sentence, as applicable to inactive status), and 34:440 (last 41 words of 2d sentence). 10:1036c (proviso of last sentence, as applicable to inactive status) and 34:440k (proviso of last sentence, as applicable to inactive status) are omitted as executed. 10:1036c (last sentence, less 1st 17 words and less proviso, as applicable to inactive status) and 34:440k (last sentence, less 1st 17 words and less proviso, as applicable to inactive status) are omitted as surplusage.oIn subsection (b), 10:1036c (proviso of last sentence, less applicability to inactive status) and 34:440k (proviso of last sentence, less applicability to inactive status) are omitted as executed. 10:1036c (last sentence, less 1st 17 words and less proviso, less applicability to inactive status) and 34:440k (last sentence, less 1st 17 words and less proviso, less applicability to inactive status) are omitted as surplusage.

1962ActThe change conforms to the source law, the last sentence of section 304 of the Army and Air Force Vitalization and Retirement Equalization Act of 1948 (). Section 305 makes the change retroactive to , the date of repeal of the source law by the original military codification act of that date.section 1334(b) of title 1062 Stat. 1089August 10, 1956

Amendments1994— renumbered as this section and amended text generally, changing one section reference.Pub. L. 103–337section 1334 of this title1962—Subsec. (b). substituted “retirement (without pay) for failure to conform to standards and qualifications prescribed under may not be credited in a computation” for “retirement or transfer to the Retired Reserve may not be credited in any computation.”Pub. L. 87–651section 1001 of this title

children.label: a
children.text: Service in an inactive status may not be counted in any computation of years of service under this chapter.

children.label: b
children.text: Time spent after retirement (without pay) for failure to conform to standards and qualifications prescribed under may not be credited in a computation of years of service under this chapter.section 12641 of this title
